name: Dug Technology Ltd
analysis: It is coming off a base, 20% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.2800, stop A$2.0988, target A$2.8236 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
